G

get_list_of_all_messages_from_the_database_test() - Method in class pjv.utils.HibernateUtilsTest
 
getChatRoomId() - Method in class pjv.model.ChatRoom
This method gets ID of ChatRoom instance.
getChatRoomName() - Method in class pjv.model.ChatRoom
This method gets name of ChatRoom instance.
getClient() - Method in class pjv.controller.ClientHandler
This method gets Client instance of connected client.
getClientChatRoomId() - Method in class pjv.model.Client
This method gets ID of chatRoom of Client instance.
getClientHandlers() - Static method in class pjv.controller.Server
This method gets list of all ClientHandler instances.
getClientId() - Method in class pjv.model.Client
This method gets ID of Client instance.
getClientUserName() - Method in class pjv.model.Client
This method gets username of Client instance.
getDateTime() - Method in class pjv.model.Message
This method gets date and time when the message was sent.
getFromClientId() - Method in class pjv.model.Message
This method gets ID of client who sent the message.
getFromClientName() - Method in class pjv.model.Message
This method gets name of client who sent the message.
getIdMessage() - Method in class pjv.model.Message
This method gets ID of Message instance.
getMessageText() - Method in class pjv.model.Message
This method gets text of the sent message.
getServer() - Method in class pjv.controller.Server
This method gets ServerSocket instance.
getSocket() - Method in class pjv.controller.Server
This method gets Socket instance.
getToChatRoomId() - Method in class pjv.model.Message
This method gets ID of chatRoom in which the message was sent.
getToClientName() - Method in class pjv.model.Message
This method gets name of client to whom the private message was sent.
